title: TAPEBEAR Black Stretch Wrap Film 100mm x 305m Shrink Wrap Roll with Handle, 60 Gauge Thick Durable Self-Adhering Plastic Wrap Industrial Strength Pallet Shrink for Moving, Packing, Storage
features: BLACK FOR PRIVACY PROTECTION: Our black stretch film is specially designed to provide complete opacity and discreet coverage, ensuring your items remain hidden from view during storage or transit. Unlike standard clear films, the deep black color blocks visibility entirely, preventing outsiders from identifying contents. It also provides UV protection by reducing sunlight exposure.

SELF-ADHERING,FAST WRAPPING: Our premium stretch film wrap is made of durable material. This wrap sticks tightly to itself, offering a better film cling, thus achieving an efficient application - faster and more secure than twine, tape & strapping.

CLEAN REMOVAL,NO RESIDUE: Our banding film has a glossy and slippery outer surface that resists dust and dirt. The film adheres to itself for a perfect seal, but leaves no residue, ensuring 100% clean removal. You don't have to worry about sticky glue.

SOLID HANDLE,EASY TO USE: The solid handle makes it easy to maneuver the wrap around objects and tear it with minimal force. The black design makes it easy to wrap your items. Whether you're organizing your belongings or storing them, this black plastic wrap provides the convenience you need.

ALL-WEATHER MOVING HELPER: This mini stretch wrap is built with industrial grade 60 gauge (15 micron) thickness. Perfect for high-value goods, sensitive materials, wrapping books, valuable things, large pictures, and it makes wrapping rugs, carpets, appliances a breeze. Protect items from getting dirty or scratched during transportation.
